cues.text: Munich, the Olympic Stadium. West Germany, the hosts, against Holland — Cruyff, Neeskens, and the total football that has enchanted this tournament.
A penalty to Holland inside the first minute — Cruyff brought down before a German had even touched the ball! Neeskens thumps it home! What a start!
Vogts goes into the referee's book.
Hanegem goes into the referee's book.
Now a penalty to the Germans... Breitner sends the keeper the wrong way. All square in the final.
Neeskens goes into the referee's book.
Bonhof to the byline, pulled back — Müller! He swivels, and scores! Gerd Müller, as ever, in the one yard that matters!
Johan Cruyff goes into the referee's book.
And that's half time. Netherlands 1, Germany 2.
A big chance for Rep... it won't count. Netherlands so close.
West Germany are champions of the world. Holland — perhaps the finest team of their age — beaten in the final they were born to win.
